name: Lemon Snow Jello
recipeIngredient: 2 large jars Junior baby food (I prefer Hawaiian Delight)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the crushed pineapple, baby food, cream cheese, sugar, and jello in a large saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Allow it to cool completely.
4. Whip the can of Milnot and add it to the cooled mixture.
5. Pour into a jello mold or other serving container.
6. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
Milnot is a brand name for evaporated milk (unsweetened)
